ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the component */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor or manufacturer of the component */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model of the component */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series or family of the component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., resistor, capacitor, transistor) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the component (e.g., passive, active) */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Physical package type of the component (e.g., SMD, through-hole) */,
  "operating_temperature_range" TEXT /* Operating temperature range of the component */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL of the component's datasheet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the component record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the component record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., Input low level, Input high level) */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., electrical, mechanical) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter value (e.g., float, integer, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_conditions" (
  "test_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test condition */,
  "test_condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the test condition (e.g., V = 0.9V, V = 2.1V) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the test condition */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of the test (e.g., electrical, thermal) */,
  "test_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used for testing */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during testing (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_parameters" (
  "component_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component parameter */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "typ_value" REAL /* Typical value of the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "tolerance" TEXT /* Tolerance of the parameter value */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Method used to test the parameter */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was tested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_parameters_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_parameters_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_test_conditions" (
  "component_test_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component test condition */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "test_condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test condition */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test condition */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_test_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_test_conditions_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_test_conditions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_test_conditions_test_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_condition_id") REFERENCES test_conditions ("test_condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the vendor */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the vendor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the vendor's website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the vendor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the vendor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., standard, high-performance) */,
  "date_released" TEXT /* Date when the model was released */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the series */,
  "series_type" TEXT /* Type of the series (e.g., general-purpose, specialized) */,
  "date_released" TEXT /* Date when the series was released */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the series record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the series record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., V, μA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the unit */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to a standard unit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the unit record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the unit record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_units" (
  "component_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component unit */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor specific to the component and parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the component unit record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the component unit record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_units_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_units_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_units_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the database */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the database */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_history" (
  "component_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the component */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the update */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Detailed log of changes made in the update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the component history record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_history_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_history_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_collaborations" (
  "component_collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., leader, contributor) */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration started */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration ended */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the collaboration record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the collaboration record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_collaborations_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
